parsed.reasoning_summary: Rule 20 requires a NICU-certified nurse for the NICU night shift on Thu Mar 5. Rule 12 limits Nurse A (the only NICU-certified nurse stated in this subset) to day shifts only, and rule 13 places Nurse E (who has NICU certification per rule 5) on leave through Mar 9 — but even without rule 5, under closed-world with rules {12,13,20}, no NICU-certified night-shift-available nurse exists.
